project_type: Next.js 16 web frontend with React 19, Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui components
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test script in package.json)
verification_instructions: Run npm run typecheck and npm run build from osai-web/
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. No test runner configured - use typecheck + build for verification.
contribution_requirements: Branch naming: feat/*, commits should be descriptive
key_patterns: Custom CSS design system in globals.css (framer dark theme, CSS variables). Components use lucide-react icons. Radix UI primitives wrapped in components/ui/ (Tooltip, Dialog). No Tailwind preflight - custom reset in globals.css. Data-attributes for active states (data-active, data-state). Sidebar uses flat NAV array rendered with .sidebar-nav-item class.
directory_structure: osai-web/app/ contains page routes (ask/, settings/, workflows/). osai-web/components/ has shared components (sidebar.tsx, app-shell.tsx). osai-web/components/ui/ has shadcn/radix primitives (tooltip, dialog, button). osai-web/app/globals.css is the main design-system CSS.
